---
title: "Loading custom DSDT"
date: 2013-04-22
forum: General Help
---

### Post by 0xc0de on 2013-04-22
Hello everyone! I make fixed DSDT for ASUS M3N-HT Deluxe/Mempipe. I compile (*iasl -tc dsdt.dsl*) it and place in */boot*.
Next step i configure kernel (3.8.8-ck) to load custom DSDT from */boot/dsdt.aml*, and enable *ACPI tables overwrite via initrd*.
But compiler (make deb-pkg) gives me an error:
